title: Molecular Geometry: Predicting 3D Structures
description: Learn to predict and understand molecular geometries using VSEPR theory, molecular orbital considerations, and computational geometry optimization.
learningObjectives: Apply VSEPR theory to predict molecular shapes
Understand the relationship between electron domains and geometry
Explain deviations from ideal geometries due to lone pairs
Describe how quantum chemistry calculates equilibrium structures
Connect molecular geometry to chemical reactivity
